creator: bago@datasail.net
text:
This patch will make apache+php-1.3.9+3.0.12 supports XML via internal apache-1.3.9 libexpat.

Fix: 

here are the diffs in scripts/configure.php :

23a24
> XML             "PHP:    XML support" OFF \
107a109,111
>                 \"XML\")
>                         echo "PHP_CONF_ARGS+= --with-xml"
>                         ;;
